Package creational

package creational
The creational package contains classes and interfaces for implementing various creational design patterns.

This package includes patterns such as Singleton, Factory Method, and Abstract Factory, helping to create objects in a flexible and reusable manner.

  • Class
    Description
    ClothingFactory
    The ClothingFactory class implements the ProductFactory interface.
    ElectronicsFactory
    The ElectronicsFactory class implements the ProductFactory interface.
    GroceryFactory
    The GroceryFactory class implements the ProductFactory interface.
    ProductFactory
    The ProductFactory interface defines a factory method for creating products.
    SingletonStore
    The SingletonStore class represents a store that uses the Singleton design pattern to ensure only one instance of the store exists throughout the application.
